text:
F0800C_STF_TUB_BATH_CD F0800C_STF_TUB_BATH_CD F0800C Staff Assessment: Tub Bath Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to receive a tub bath. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
200 F0800D_STF_SHWR_CD F0800D_STF_SHWR_CD F0800D Staff Assessment: Shower Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident prefers to receive a shower. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked
